name: release-promo
description: Drafts release-announcement posts for the platforms a project actually belongs on. Skills for Reddit (with explicit guidance for Matrix subs r/matrixprotocol and r/matrixdotorg, plus language and topic subs), This Week in Matrix, Hacker News Show HN, Lobsters, and Fediverse. The /promote-release command surveys the repo, picks eligible channels, and drafts one post per channel.
